kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: More members of the River Ward are in the Clothiers' Guild than members of the Market Ward.
The artisan who makes Barrels' levy is between the Tanner and the artisan in Bridgegate.
15 coins goes with exactly three of Beatrix, Blacksmith, Anvil, Barrels, and Bridgegate.
The artisan with the Saw's levy is exactly 4 coins more than the artisan in Millpond.
Exactly one of Wulfric and the Tanner belongs to the Market Ward.
The Tanner's levy is lower than both the artisan with the Mallet and the artisan who makes Horseshoes.
The artisan with the Awl has a higher levy than the Mason.
The artisan in Millpond's levy is immediately next to the artisan who makes Horseshoes.
Rowan's levy is exactly 4 coins more than the artisan who makes Tapestries.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: More members of the South Watershed are in the Pike Family than members of the East Watershed.
The angler fishing with Maggot's weight is between the angler who landed the Perch and the angler at Cedarmere.
15 lb goes with exactly three of Dale, Bass, Crankbait, Maggot, and Cedarmere.
The angler using the Wobbler's weight is exactly 4 lb more than the angler at Pinehollow.
Exactly one of Royce and the angler who landed the Perch belongs to the East Watershed.
The angler who landed the Perch's weight is lower than both the angler using the Spoon and the angler fishing with Nightcrawler.
The angler using the Spinnerbait has a higher weight than the angler who landed the Crappie.
The angler at Pinehollow's weight is immediately next to the angler fishing with Nightcrawler.
Gus' weight is exactly 4 lb more than the angler fishing with Shrimp.
